title: Quantum enhanced precision metrology for quantum networks
author_string: Jabir, M. V., Dawkins, Riley, Sabines-Chesterking, J., Reddy, Dileep V., Lita, A. E. et al.
abstract: We construct a source generating two-mode squeezed vacuum states for precise transmission estimation. Experimentally, we demonstrate that measurements using TMSV states offer greater quantum advantage compared to coherent states.
